# Photo gallery

::: {.callout-tip title="Full-resolution photos and videos"}

High-resolution photos are available on
[Zenodo](https://zenodo.org/records/20642845),
and recordings of the conference sessions are available on the
[Bioconductor YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLdl4u5ZRDMQSeTgs5bOmbGmSMWVZits14).

:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis
#| label: photo_gallery
source("../R/photo_gallery.R")
.create_photo_gallery()
```
